GetVendors: SELECT v.VendorID, v.VendorCode, v.VendorName, v.VendorGroupCode AS VendorGroupID, v.CompanyName, v.PhoneNo, v.Fax, v.WebSite AS Web, v.AddressLine1, v.AddressLine2, v.City, v.Province, v.Postalcode AS PostalCode, v.CountryID AS Country, v.VendorClassID AS VendorClass, v.VendorCertificate AS VendorCertificates, v.MainContactPersonTitle AS ContactSalutation, v.MainContactPersonName AS ContactPersonName, v.MainContactPersonPosition AS ContactInitials, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo1 AS ContactPhone1, v.MainContactPersonPhoneNo2 AS ContactPhone2, v.MainContactPersonEmail AS ContactEmail, v.DefaultCurrencyCode AS Currency, v.DefaultPaymentTypeCode AS PaymentTerm, v.PaymentReference, v.RemittanceContactSameasMainContact AS IsSameAsMainContact, v.RemittanceContactPersonTitle AS RemitSalutation, v.RemittanceContactPersonName AS RemitPersonName, v.RemittanceContactPersonPosition AS RemitPosition, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1 AS RemitPhone1, v.RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2 AS RemitPhone2, v.RemittanceContactPersonEmail AS RemitEmail, v.Activeflag AS ActiveFlag, v.DefaultShippingTermCode AS ShippingTerms, v.DefaultDeliveryModeCode AS DeliveryMode, v.FOBPointCode AS FobPoint, c.CountryName FROM tblVendorDetail v LEFT JOIN tblCountryMaster c ON v.CountryID = c.CountryID
CreateVendor: DECLARE @NewID NVARCHAR(10); BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT @NewID = 'VDC' + RIGHT('000000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(VendorID, 6) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR(10)), 6) FROM tblVendorDetail WITH (UPDLOCK, HOLDLOCK) WHERE VendorID LIKE 'VDC%'; INSERT INTO tblVendorDetail (VendorID, VendorCode, VendorName, VendorGroupCode, CompanyName, PhoneNo, Fax, WebSite, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, City, Province, Postalcode, CountryID, VendorClassID, VendorCertificate, MainContactPersonTitle, MainContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, MainContactPersonEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode, DefaultPaymentTypeCode, PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle, RemittanceContactPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail, Activeflag, DefaultShippingTermCode, DefaultDeliveryModeCode, FOBPointCode) VALUES (@NewID, @VendorCode, @VendorName, @VendorGroupCode, @CompanyName, @PhoneNo, @Fax, @WebSite, @AddressLine1, @AddressLine2, @City, @Province, @PostalCode, @CountryID, @VendorClassID, @VendorCertificate, @MainContactPersonTitle, @MainContactPersonName, @MainContactPersonPosition, @MainContactPersonPhoneNo1, @MainContactPersonPhoneNo2, @MainContactPersonEmail, @DefaultCurrencyCode, @DefaultPaymentTypeCode, @PaymentReference, @RemittanceContactSameasMainContact, @RemittanceContactPersonTitle, @RemittanceContactPersonName, @RemittanceContactPersonPosition, @RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1, @RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2, @RemittanceContactPersonEmail, @ActiveFlag, @DefaultShippingTermCode, @DefaultDeliveryModeCode, @FOBPointCode); COMMIT TRANSACTION; SELECT @NewID AS NewVendorID;
UpdateVendor: UPDATE tblVendorDetail SET VendorCode = @VendorCode, VendorName = @VendorName, VendorGroupCode = @VendorGroupID, CompanyName = @CompanyName, PhoneNo = @PhoneNo, Fax = @Fax, WebSite = @Web, AddressLine1 = @AddressLine1, AddressLine2 = @AddressLine2, City = @City, Province = @Province, Postalcode = @PostalCode, CountryID = @Country, VendorClassID = @VendorClass, VendorCertificate = @VendorCertificates, MainContactPersonTitle = @ContactSalutation, MainContactPersonName = @ContactPersonName, MainContactPersonPosition = @ContactInitials, MainContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @ContactPhone1, MainContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @ContactPhone2, MainContactPersonEmail = @ContactEmail, DefaultCurrencyCode = @Currency, DefaultPaymentTypeCode = @PaymentTerm, PaymentReference = @PaymentReference, RemittanceContactSameasMainContact = @IsSameAsMainContact, RemittanceContactPersonTitle = @RemitSalutation, RemittanceContactPersonName = @RemitPersonName, RemittanceContactPersonPosition = @RemitPosition, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo1 = @RemitPhone1, RemittanceContactPersonPhoneNo2 = @RemitPhone2, RemittanceContactPersonEmail = @RemitEmail, Activeflag = @ActiveFlag, DefaultShippingTermCode = @DefaultShippingTermCode, DefaultDeliveryModeCode = @DefaultDeliveryModeCode, FOBPointCode = @FOBPointCode WHERE VendorID = @VendorID; SELECT 1 AS Success;
